Title: sys_stat
Description: Return statistical information about the Virtuoso server.

This function returns the statistic related to the requested statistic name
give as a parameter to the function.
Examples:
SQL> select concat(sys_stat('st_dbms_name'), ' - ', sys_stat('st_dbms_ver'));
callret
VARCHAR
OpenLink Virtuoso PHP4 Server - 03.00.2402
